content.speakerText: Your refund is processed. You'll get a receipt.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的退税已处理，这是收据。

options.text: Thanks so much! Have a great day!
I'll call you if there's a problem.
Can you send it to my email?
How long will it take to arrive?

content.explanation: 正确答案是表达感谢并礼貌道别，符合退款确认后的语境。选项2是针对问题的回应，不适用于收据已给出的场景；选项3是请求额外服务，与对方陈述不符；选项4询问时间，但对方已说明‘已处理’，无需再问。

content.speakerText: If you have any issues, call this number.
content.speakerTextCn: 如有问题，请拨打这个电话。

options.text: Got it, I'll save it right away.
I don't think I'll need it.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确确认并承诺保存号码，符合‘别只说谢谢，确认联系方式’的使用说明。选项2虽礼貌但未体现‘行动确认’，不够充分；选项3试图改变沟通方式，不合要求；选项4否定帮助渠道，显得不合作。

content.speakerText: Your refund of $245 has been credited to your account.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的245美元退款已存入账户。

options.text: Perfect! I'll keep the confirmation email for my records.
Can you refund more? I need $300.
I'm not sure if this is correct.

content.explanation: 正确答案既确认信息又表明保留凭证，体现专业和谨慎。选项2提出额外要求，不合语境；选项3表达怀疑，语气不礼貌；选项4虽礼貌但过于简略，未体现对关键信息的确认。

content.template: Thanks so much! I'll ___ the receipt for future reference.
content.hint: 收据需要保留以备争议时使用
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：keep a receipt（保留收据）

content.template: Got it — I'll ___ this number in my phone right away.
content.hint: 确认联系方式时的正确动作
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：save a number（保存号码）

content.template: The refund is complete. ___ me know if anything doesn't look right.
content.hint: 邀请对方反馈的标准表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Let me know（让我知道）

content.speakerText: Your refund is processed. You'll get a receipt.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的退税已处理，这是收据。
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! I'll keep this for my records.
Great, thanks! I'll make sure to save the receipt.
Appreciate it! I'll check it against my bank statement.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应了收据信息并表达感谢
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，语气礼貌
关键词覆盖：使用了 'receipt' 或 'keep/save' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: If you have any issues, call this number.
content.speakerTextCn: 如有问题，请拨打这个电话。
expectedAnswers: Got it, I'll save it in my contacts right away.
Thanks — I've already added it to my phone.
I'll write it down so I don't lose it.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认并承诺保存号码，而非仅说谢谢
语言准确性：动词使用正确（save, add, write down）
表达自然度：符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'save', 'number', 'phone', 'contact' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Your refund of $189 has been successfully credited to your account.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的189美元退款已成功存入账户。
expectedAnswers: Perfect, thank you! I'll check my account later and reach out if there's a discrepancy.
Thanks! I'll keep the confirmation email just in case.
That's great news — I appreciate your help!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：确认退款完成并表达感谢，体现主动性
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态和词汇（credited, discrepancy, confirmation）
表达自然度：语气真诚、符合商务/服务场景的礼貌风格
关键词覆盖：使用了 'refund', 'credited', 'confirmation', 'discrepancy' 等核心词汇
